comprehensive-goal-gathering.signature: Structured prompts covering features, bugs, tech debt, UX improvements, and deferred decisions
comprehensive-goal-gathering.description: Goal-gathering phase systematically covers all requirement categories to prevent missed requirements

deferred-decisions-import.signature: Reads .planning/sets/*/DEFERRED.md and surfaces deferred items for new milestone consideration
deferred-decisions-import.description: Previously deferred decisions from discuss-set are imported as candidate goals for the new version

deferred-decisions-format.description: Reads deferred decisions files produced by the overhauled discuss-set skill

no-missed-requirements.description: Goal-gathering prompts systematically cover features, bugs, tech debt, UX, and deferred decisions -- user explicitly confirms completeness

deferred-surfacing.description: All deferred decisions from the previous milestone are presented to the user for inclusion/exclusion in the new milestone

definition.scope: Makes /new-version comprehensive by adding structured goal-gathering prompts across all requirement categories and importing deferred decisions from the previous milestone's discuss-set outputs.

tasks.description: Add structured goal-gathering with systematic category coverage
tasks.acceptance: Goal prompts cover features, bugs, tech debt, UX, and deferred decisions

tasks.description: Import and surface deferred decisions from previous milestone
tasks.acceptance: Deferred items from .planning/sets/*/DEFERRED.md are presented for consideration
User explicitly confirms all requirements captured before proceeding to research

acceptance: Structured prompts systematically cover all requirement categories
Deferred decisions from previous milestone surfaced for consideration
User confirms completeness before research pipeline begins
No missed requirements in generated milestone scope
